ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., bowler, batsman, all-rounder) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spinner) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "player_nickname" TEXT /* Nickname or alias for the player */,
  "player_bowling_variations" TEXT /* Different types of deliveries a player can bowl (e.g., fast, spin, swing) */,
  "player_batting_hand" TEXT /* The hand with which the player bats */,
  "player_bowling_hand" TEXT /* The hand with which the player bowls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_short_name" TEXT /* Shortened name for the team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Primary sponsor of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "result_margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., 5 wickets, 20 runs) */,
  "match_toss_winner" INTEGER /* The team that won the toss */,
  "match_toss_decision" TEXT /* The decision made by the toss-winning team (e.g., bat, bowl) */,
  "match_result_status" TEXT /* The status of the match result (e.g., completed, abandoned, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's match record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "role_in_match" TEXT /* Role of the player in the match (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the player batted */,
  "bowling_position" INTEGER /* Position in which the player bowled */,
  "batting_score" TEXT /* Batting score of the player */,
  "bowling_overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "bowling_maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player */,
  "bowling_runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded by the player */,
  "bowling_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "bowling_wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled by the player */,
  "bowling_no_balls" INTEGER /* Number of no balls bowled by the player */,
  "record_economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the match */,
  "record_strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the match */,
  "record_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Bowling figures of the player in the match (e.g., 3/20, 2/30) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_records_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for the coach (e.g., batting, bowling, fielding) */,
  "coach_awards" TEXT /* Notable awards or recognition received by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was founded */,
  "venue_capacity_type" TEXT /* Type of seating capacity (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "venue_facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the venue (e.g., gym, swimming pool, hotel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "tournament_format_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the tournament format (e.g., group stage, knockout stage) */,
  "tournament_prize_money" INTEGER /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments_teams" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of team participation (e.g., confirmed, pending, withdrawn) */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of team participation confirmation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_teams_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "total_maidens" INTEGER /* Total maidens bowled by the player */,
  "total_overs" INTEGER /* Total overs bowled by the player */,
  "total_wides" INTEGER /* Total wides bowled by the player */,
  "total_no_balls" INTEGER /* Total no balls bowled by the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score of the player */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figure of the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "bowling_average" REAL /* Bowling average of the player */,
  "total_catches" INTEGER /* Total catches taken by the player */,
  "total_stumpings" INTEGER /* Total stumpings made by the player */,
  "total_runouts" INTEGER /* Total runouts made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "total_overs" INTEGER /* Total overs bowled in the match */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the match */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken in the match */,
  "total_maidens" INTEGER /* Total maidens bowled in the match */,
  "total_wides" INTEGER /* Total wides bowled in the match */,
  "total_no_balls" INTEGER /* Total no balls bowled in the match */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total fours hit in the match */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total sixes hit in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., player, match, team) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the system (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team composition */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "player_role_in_match" TEXT /* Role of the player in the match (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the player batted */,
  "bowling_position" INTEGER /* Position in which the player bowled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
